generalInstructions: Ensure all operator credentials and skill levels match process matrix requirements.
Verify EPDM rubber hose material lot number matches BOM before loading onto cutting jig.
Calibrate CJ-22 crimp machine pressure sensors using standard 6.5 MPa test block every shift.
Maintain ambient oven temperature within 155°C ± 10°C limits at all times.

steps.name: Picking
steps.instruction: Scan part QR labels. Verify EPDM Hose lot tags and metal collar batch counts against SAP Work Order details.

steps.name: Hose Cutting 1 & 2
steps.instruction: Load inner EPDM tube. Slice lengths to 234±2mm or 94±2mm on scaling deck. Check for smooth edges without distortion.

steps.name: Protector Sleeve Cutting
steps.instruction: Cut EPDM/NBR protector sleeve to 190±3mm length. Check lining thickness and ensure internal sleeves have zero debris.

steps.name: CNC Pipe Bending
steps.instruction: Load tube onto BNF-IYM-02 Jig. Auto-bend and verify angles are within 102.2°±10° tolerances. Inspect outer surfaces for crack lines.

steps.name: Fitting Bending
steps.instruction: Double-check height parameter at -274 and L-R settings at -L80. Secure and bend fitting collars on EF02 blocks.

steps.name: Fitting Hose Crimping
steps.instruction: Insert metal collar fittings on EPDM hose ends. Crimp on CJ-22 Crimping Jigs. Verify outer diameter stays within 9.00±0.05mm range.

steps.name: Accessories Bonding
steps.instruction: Apply bonding adhesive compounds. Fix protective NBR sleeves in BJ-IYM-22-1A/B Bonding Jigs and inspect bond alignment.

steps.name: HMI Oven Curing
steps.instruction: Transfer assembled hoses to HMI curing oven. Bake at 155°C±10°C for exactly 5 minutes and 30 seconds.

steps.name: Double Pipe Torquing
steps.instruction: Perform double-end nut tightening using TOJ-IYM-22-A/B torque wrenches. Lock limits at 12-17Nm and record peak torque indicators.

steps.name: Leak / Pressure Testing
steps.instruction: Clamp assembly onto air/water tester. Pump test pressure to 15.2+1.0/-0 MPa for 36 seconds. Watch for bubble discharge or drop logs.

steps.name: Final Inspection & Packing
steps.instruction: Validate dimensional targets on FI-IYM-22 Final Inspection Jigs. Print SAP traceability labels and pack into plastic bins.

generalInstructions: Record final pressure values into quality log book.
Check final visual scuffs to ensure perfect compliance.
Ensure all batch tracking QR labels are applied cleanly.
